# CAREER OBJECTIVE

Dedicated Computer Science student with strong foundation in Data Structures, Algorithms, and AI-powered applications. Proven track record of winning national hackathons and building innovative solutions. Seeking opportunities to leverage technical skills in full-stack development and machine learning to create impactful software solutions.

result.title: KEY PROJECTS
result.summary: The text describes two key projects: QuantumQuery.AI, an AI-powered system for natural language to SQL queries in retail inventory management, utilizing Python, SQL, NLP, Machine Learning, and FastAPI; and CandidateDigitalPortfolio, a student portfolio management system built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSP/Servlets, Apache Tomcat, and MySQL.
result.text:
# KEY PROJECTS

QuantumQuery.AI — AI-Powered Natural Language to SQL Query System

- Developed intelligent system for smart inventory management in retail stores enabling natural language database queries
- Implemented multi-language query support with predictive query handling for seamless user experience
- Built real-time inventory insights engine with comprehensive error handling and query optimization
- Technologies: Python, SQL, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Machine Learning, FastAPI

CandidateDigitalPortfolio — Student Portfolio Management System

- Architected web-based platform for students to maintain structured digital profiles with projects, certifications, and achievements
- Implemented secure user authentication system with registration and login functionality
- Developed centralized dashboard for seamless data management and professional profile showcase
- Created MySQL database schema for efficient storage of student information and documents
- Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JSP/Servlets, Apache Tomcat, MySQL, Eclipse IDE, MySQL Workbench

- Finalist — Amaravati Quantum Valley Hackathon 2025, Andhra Pradesh (National Finals)
- Finalist — Smart India Hackathon (SIH) 2025 (National Competition)
- 2-starCoder — CodeChef (Competitive Programming Platform)
